headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Question
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.

raw.headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Question

headline: Colgate-Palmolive Announces Quarterly Dividend Increase and Elects Christopher Boerner, Ph.D. to Board of Directors
summary: NEW YORK, March 12, 2026--The Board of Directors of Colgate-Palmolive Company (NYSE:CL) today announced an increase in the quarterly common stock cash dividend to $0.53 up from $0.52 per share. The increase will be effective in the second quarter, 2026. The Board declared that the second quarter dividend is to be paid on May 15, 2026, to shareholders of record on April 20, 2026. On an annualized basis, the new dividend rate is $2.12 versus $2.08 per share previously. The Company has paid uninter

headline: Is Bristol Myers' Deep Pipeline the Key to Future Growth?
summary: BMY highlights a deep pipeline with multiple late-stage candidates and registrational data expected in 2026, reinforcing confidence in its next-gen CELMoD program.

headline: Incyte (INCY) Down 4.2% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?

headline: Defense Lifts Moat Stocks As Tech Stumbles
summary: Moat Index gained 2.13% in February, outperforming the S&P 500 by nearly 3 percentage points as defensive rotation favored its equal-weighted, valuation-conscious approach.

headline: Piper Sandler Sees Path to Growth for Bristol-Myers Squibb Company (BMY) After Eliquis Patent Expiry
summary: Bristol-Myers Squibb Company (NYSE:BMY) ranks among the 14 safe stocks to buy now for a starter stock portfolio. On February 23, Piper Sandler boosted its price target for Bristol-Myers Squibb Company (NYSE:BMY) to $75 from $66 while keeping an Overweight rating on the company’s shares. The firm outlined two avenues for the pharma giant’s comeback […]
